mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, subject, remark, yearmonth, add_date, add_id, modify_date, modify_id FROM ( SELECT a.homepage_id, a.manage_idx, b.board_name, a.subject, a.remark, a.yearmonth, a.add_date, a.add_id, a.modify_date, a.modify_id, a.category1 FROM THEME_BOOK a, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE b WHERE a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND a.yearmonth LIKE #{searchYear} || '%' AND a.category1 = #{category1} ) a, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchYear}||'01', 'YYYYMM'),(LEVEL - 1)), 'YYYY-MM') AS YMD FROM DUAL CONNECT BY ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{searchYear}||'01', 'YYYYMM'),(LEVEL - 1)) <= TO_DATE(#{searchYear}||'12', 'YYYYMM') ) b WHERE a.yearmonth(+) = b.ymd ORDER BY YMD
